root.summary: Legal knowledge system for labor law review with 100% strict type safety and mandatory operational directives. MUST bypass manual testing and rely on the automated .git/hooks/pre-commit pipeline enforcing Next.js Linting, Vitest, Ruff, and Pytest coverage.

children.name: backend
children.summary: FastAPI backend architecture decoupled via Celery workers and a Redis broker. Features 140+ remediated strict mypy types, robust Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming isolated from process memory, and 97% Pytest coverage.

children.name: frontend
children.summary: Next.js frontend with memoized components, explicit server actions re-exports for Turbopack compatibility, integrated auth, and deep Prisma graph relations.
